system.flavor: You vaporize a large area of the battlefield, then lash the resultant water aether towards you before it reforms.
system.effect: Effect [X]: Characters in the area take 3 piercing damage. Then pull all characters and summons in the area 1d3+1 with phasing. Characters may pass a save to avoid being pulled. One (3+) two or (5+) all characters pulled this way leave an obscured space in the first space they vacate.
